item.title: I want more upvotes to give away!
item.description:
On the android app
How do I give more upvotes!?!?
item.dc:creator: airwoman

item.title: Can no longer change or remove upvotes/downvotes
item.description: Just noticed recently that I can't change or remove any upvotes or downvotes I make. It happens on both the Android app and on the desktop browser. Or maybe it's just my account. I'd like to give them the benefit of the doubt and say it's a bug, but Imgur's new management has made some extremely shitty decisions lately, that I'm thinking this might be intentional.
item.dc:creator: onepinksheep

item.dc:creator: OnlyByMoonlight

item.title: Yes!!!
item.description: I bought a used car with warranty about 7 months ago. I ended up needing new brakes after a month of driving. So I took it back to the dealer in hopes of using my warranty but he kept insisting the warranty doesn’t cover it. So I paid for it and when I got home, I called the warranty people and they said I had no warranty under my name or the car’s VIN. I demanded answers from the dealer and he basically kept brushing me off until I decided to just sue the guy. Fast forward to now, the judge sided with me and awarded me $500 (the amount I paid for the warranty) and called the dealer a crook whose business should be investigated for fraud in case he’s doing this to others. I’m still reeling, I’ve never done anything like this in my life lol
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Happy Easter - Bunny Cosplay
item.description: Also, Happy Transgender Day of Visibility - That's right!!! You thought this was about Easter?? Nah, I gotcha - now you are more aware of March 31st in case you weren't before. Also I found this new gif from this cosplay I did a while back... I had to find an excuse to share it somehow :P
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online chums
nope
mmm hmm
tegu dgaf
we've all drawn this exact image at some point or another
metal isn't my number 1 genre but i love it and it's definitely top 5
don't do drugs gang
it has copper so you know it's good
dang
ass turtles
accurate
yes
again
good to know there are no non-handsome men!
i knew it
i like this person
can't argue with that
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Trans Day of Awareness Meme Dump
item.description:
As an oldtimer on the internet (think Newgrounds and AlbinoBlackSheep) it was interesting to see the "Everyone is gay for Bridget" memes to come back. Memes are also cyclical, like fashion.
It's so ridiculously easy.
Bigotry is truly the mark of a coward.
To be cweawr, this was the Gwavel Institute founded by the fowmewr Senatowr fwom Awaska, Mike Gwavel. They wewe a weft-uwuing advocacy gwoup that sadwy went down in 2022.
I work at a psych clinic and have this hanging on my wall next to my desk and a patient with schizophrenia got BIG MAD that I wanted to protect Trans kids. They ended up discharging from the clinic, essentially over this. My boss, in an unusual display of sass, made the following note on the patient's chart: "Patient is *transitioning* to a new clinic."
I wish there was an option for "I don't know" because I'd mark that in so hard there would be a hole in the paper.
What if you didn't transition and you are 3 of these?
@abbiistabbii in the wild!
Me, reading this for the first time, after the first two lines: Huh, sounds like a rabbit. Third line: DEFINITELY a rabbit. Then I saw the name.
I will stop calling it Twitter once the Muskrat stops dead naming his kid.
Probably one of my greatest comedic achievements was posting this and one of my Transfemme friends going "I don't get it." Me: *Inhales* To be fair, I am known for making Deez Nuts jokes.
item.dc:creator: SalmySwims

item.title: On Trans day of Visibility
item.description: Words seem like far too little support these days, and I will keep speaking up for my LGBTQIA+ people. You deserve much better than what the world is trying to do to you. ❤️ https://imgur.com/gallery/lWjGArj
